title: WHO Regional Offices Display Values
description: Display values for WHO Regional Offices ValueSet codes. Generated from FHIR expansions. Keys are code fragments (the part after '#' in the canonical IRI). The full IRI can be reconstructed as system + '#' + code.

fhir:displays.description: Multilingual display values for ValueSet codes keyed by code fragment

^.+$.description: Display values for a specific code fragment by language

^[a-z]{2}(-[A-Z]{2})?$.description: Display value in the specified language (ISO 639-1 code)

AMRO.en: WHO Regional Office for the Americas

EMRO.en: WHO Regional Office for the Eastern Mediterranean

SEARO.en: WHO Regional Office for South-East Asia

WPRO.en: WHO Regional Office for the Western Pacific
